name: Haste
damage_immunities: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons that aren't adamantine
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak
description: Until the end of its next turn, the golem magically gains a +2 bonus to its AC, has advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and can use its slam attack as a bonus action. (Recharge 5-6)
